turns.speaker: Speaker A
turns.text: Hey, can we talk about the weekend plan?

turns.speaker: Speaker B
turns.text: Sure, I have a few minutes right now.

turns.speaker: Speaker A
turns.text: You always cancel and never tell me why!

turns.speaker: Speaker B
turns.text: Please stop yelling, you are scaring me now.

turns.speaker: Speaker A
turns.text: Fine. Do whatever you want. I am done.

turns.speaker: Speaker B
turns.text: I hear you. Let us slow down together.

turns.speaker: Speaker A
turns.text: Okay. I am sorry I raised my voice.

turns.speaker: Speaker B
turns.text: Thank you. That really means a lot to me.
